subject: [RFC v2 03/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in copy_huge_pmd()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on existing code and suggested a more comprehensive approach to handling split failures. Requested additional changes before considering it for merge.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes changes to the Transparent Huge Pages (THP) handling in the Linux kernel, specifically addressing a split failure scenario in the copy_huge_pmd() function. The goal is to return -ENOMEM on split failure instead of -EAGAIN, preventing potential dereferences of huge PMD entries.
